SourceString: Complete 5 commissions with a requirement in both weight and balance.
Sell 10 swords with a curved blade.
Sell 10 swords using any asymmetric ability.
Sell 5 swords with a rating of 3 in 3 categories.
Sell 10 swords with at least 10 engravings.
Sell 10 swords with at least 10 blade abilities.
Conjure a sword using Magic Words.
Please leave our beautiful game alone!
Have the hunter bring home treasure worth 1000 thalers in total.
Unlock 10 skills in the skill tree.
Finish the prologue and enter Eren Keep.
Solve the case of the mysterious fire for the Magisterium.
Deal with the black stone for the Crows of the Bloody Cloaks.
Faciliate Karelinus' expedition to the ruins of Creedhaven.
Find loot in the Lost City 5 times.

Comment: Title of the Steam game Scriptorium – Master of Manuscripts.
Egghorse is the mascot of Steam game Scriptorium – Master of Manuscripts.
